metadata.title: ZetisLabs — AI lab: custom tools you actually own
metadata.description: ZetisLabs, a French AI lab: custom AI tools (RAG, agents) that you own. One-time payment, no subscription. AI assists your experts, it never decides for them. Free 30-min audit.

hero.subtitle: ZetisLabs is the lab that helps companies cross a real AI threshold — custom integration, RAG, agents, wired into your data. You pay once: the tool and the code are yours. Your experts keep the final call on every decision.

ProblemSolution.titleProblem: The problem isn't a lack of AI.
ProblemSolution.description:
Generic AI tools that know nothing about your work
Stacked SaaS subscriptions, billed forever
The fear that AI will "hallucinate" or decide for you
Vague promises, never measured

The real issue is how you integrate AI. Not AI itself.
ProblemSolution.titleSolution: A tool wired into your data — that you own
ProblemSolution.body: We build a custom tool wired into your corpus (your documents, your vocabulary, your processes), test it on your real cases, then hand it over: the code is yours.

stat.label: one-time payment — the tool and the code are yours

ProblemSolution.accent: AI removes the mechanical work. Your experts keep the judgment and the decision.

UseCases.title: Three concrete ways to cross a threshold

first.title: Leverage your documents (RAG)
first.description: An assistant that answers from your own files — contracts, notes, references — with the source cited. Our flagship: helping an engineering office write its tender notes from its own corpus.

second.title: Automate a repetitive task (agents)
second.description: An agent that handles a chain of manual tasks — sort, extract, classify, draft — and hands it back ready to validate. The human keeps the last word.

third.title: Integrate AI into your tools
third.description: Not one more app to learn: AI plugs into what you already use — email, document space, business tools.

Process.label: Process
Process.title: How it works
Process.subtitle: Four steps, a tool that is yours at the end

1.title: Free audit (30 min)
1.description: We pinpoint the most costly time sink and whether AI is the right answer

2.title: Proposal
2.description: Clear scope, dated deliverables, fixed one-time price

3.title: Build
3.description: We build the tool on your data and test it on your real cases

4.title: Handover & ownership
4.description: You receive the tool and the code. It is now your asset.

1.question: Can AI help write an architecture-competition methodology note?
1.response: Yes, as long as it assists rather than replaces the architect. The tool draws on the firm's own corpus to structure and rephrase faster; the architect keeps control of the design intent and validates every passage. Per the MIQCP, 75% of architects find the time and cost of bids regularly off-putting.

2.question: Is a subscription required?
2.response: No. ZetisLabs works on a one-time payment: you pay once and the tool, with its code, is yours. The advantage shows in total cost over time.

3.question: Does my data stay private?
3.response: Yes. The tool runs on your environment and your corpus. Since the code is handed to you, you keep control of your data. The exact terms are set during the proposal.

4.question: Does AI replace the expert?
4.response: No, it's a design rule: AI removes the mechanical work, the judgment stays human. The tool assists the expert, it never decides or judges in their place.

5.question: Does ZetisLabs only do architecture / engineering offices?
5.response: No. ZetisLabs is a generalist AI lab: RAG, agents and custom integration, for any field. Helping write competition notes is our current flagship — concrete proof of what we can do on a real business corpus.

cta.title: Cross a real AI threshold — and keep control.
cta.description: A custom tool, wired into your data, that you own. AI does the mechanical work, your experts keep the decision. Free audit, no commitment.
